arts.ttl: Barcelona, Liverpool receive major boost Jonathan David pursuit as striker contract decision
arts.sum: European giants Barcelona and Liverpool reportedly receive a boost in their bid to sign Lille striker Jonathan David in 2025.

arts.ttl: Lewandowski, Torre net braces in Barça 5-1 win
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski and substitute Pablo Torre each scored twice to help leaders Barcelona thrash visitors Sevilla 5-1 in LaLiga on Sunday.
